career.name: Independent Projects & Freelance
career.title: Full-Stack Developer (Student / Project Lead)
description: Built and launched a full-featured Next.js blog with Tailwind CSS — including user authentication, an admin panel, post CRUD, SEO optimizations, search, and pagination.
Designed a clean MySQL schema and implemented server-side APIs in PHP, plus client-side validation and responsive UI for a smoother user experience.

Managed the project end-to-end: gathered requirements, implemented features, version-controlled the codebase with Git, and deployed the site — gaining hands-on experience with deployment and CI practices.

career.name: 3Skill Training
career.title: Web Development Intern
description: Completed a 2-month Web Development Internship focused on practical, project-based learning aligned with industry expectations.
Worked hands-on with the Next.js, TypeScript, and Supabase stack, contributing to real production-grade features and workflows.
Strengthened professional development skills including code collaboration, deployment practices, and working within a structured team environment.
